prompt: Prayer for blessing a waste recycling system on first activation
prayer:
01010000 01110010 01100101 01100011 01100101 01110000 01110100 = Blessed be the sorter-spirit's awakening.
O Omnissiah, grant thy favour to this engine of reclamation.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100: Let the filters drink deep of refuse-matter.
Second: Calibrate the pneumatic-hearts to the rhythm of abundance.
By binary and burning coal, let waste become resource eternal.

prompt: Post-repair consecration for a Chimera transport transmission
prayer:
01000011 01001111 01001110 01010100 01001001 01001110 01010101 01010101 01001101 = Continuity of the gears renewed.
We anoint the synchro-mesh with sacred oils.
01010011 01100101 01100011 01101111 01101110 01100100: The drive-spirit answers to its master once more.
Third: Engage each forward-cog with reverent pressure.
May this transmission carry the faithful unto victory, unstoppable, unwavering.

prompt: First-use blessing for water reclamation apparatus
prayer:
01010111 01000001 01010100 01000101 01010010 = The pure essence descends from heaven's vault.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100: Let the intake-valves open to the moisture-laden air.
Second: Invoke the condensation-heart, that vapour become liquid gold.
Third: Seal the collection-vessel with the Rite of Preservation.
By Omnissiah's design, let no drop escape our grasp.

prompt: Routine invocation for Knight ion shield generator activation
prayer:
01010011 01001000 01001001 01000101 01001100 01000100 = Shield-spirit, arise from dormancy.
01000001 01000011 01010100 01001001 01010110 01000001 01010100 01000101: Energise the capacitor-lattice with plasma-fire.
Let the ionosphere shimmer with our protection.
01010000 01001111 01010111 01000101 01010010: Power flows eternal, shield holds eternal.

prompt: Blessing ritual for a power weapon before deployment
prayer:
01010000 01001111 01010111 01000101 01010010 = Weapon-spirit, taste the hunger for righteousness.
01000001 01000111 01001111 01001110 01001001 01010011 01000101: We consecrate thy blade with oils of the ancients.
Second: Let the power-cell pulse with the fury of the faithful.
Third: Sharpen thy edge that it cut through heresy like parchment.
By blessed uranium and sacred circuit, strike true.

prompt: Routine calibration prayer for Taurox wheel alignment
prayer:
01010100 01010010 01000001 01000011 01010100 01001001 01001111 01001110 = The wheels must kiss the earth with perfect symmetry.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100: Let each suspension-servo find its true angle.
Second: Measure the toe and camber by the Omnissiah's compass.
Third: Torque each fastener-god to its sacred specification.
By geometry and grinding, let locomotion be made smooth.

prompt: Emergency containment prayer for fusion core breach prevention
prayer:
01000110 01010101 01010011 01001001 01001111 01001110 = The heart of stars trembles! Speak the words of binding!
01000101 01001101 01000101 01010010 01000111 01000101 01001110 01000011 01011001: Activate emergency cooling in all haste!
Second: Engage magnetic containment-webs of adamantium strength!
Third: Vent excess plasma to the void-corridors!
Omnissiah preserve us—the core-spirit must sleep, or all dies in nuclear fire!

prompt: Routine rite for long-range vox-transmission initiation
prayer:
01010100 01010010 01000001 01001110 01010011 01001101 01001001 01010011 01010011 01001001 01001111 01001110 = The word must cross the void eternal.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100: Attune the resonance-crystals to the target frequency.
Second: Let the amplifier-spirit surge with blessed electricity.
Third: Project thy message through the aether on wings of light!
May our words reach the faithful across the infinite darkness.

prompt: First-use blessing for quality control scanning apparatus
prayer:
01010011 01000011 01000001 01001110 = All must be measured, weighed, and found worthy.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100: Calibrate the sensor-eyes to perceive the sacred tolerances.
Second: Let the counting-spirit number each blessed component.
Third: Record all deviations in the Archive of Truth.
By Omnissiah's gaze, let imperfection be revealed and cast out.

prompt: First-use blessing for signal encryption mechanism
prayer:
01000101 01001110 01000011 01010010 01011001 01010000 01010100 = The message must be hidden from the unworthy.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100: Seed the cipher-engine with sacred numbers of the ancients.
Second: Let the encryption-spirit weave patterns that mock the heretic's comprehension.
Third: Lock all secrets behind doors of mathematics!
By binary cant and blessed obscurity, let truth be shielded from profane eyes.
